rationale_source: F3.FL pre-create intake classification (sibling to B10's F2.FH state-gate axis): wetransfer URL pattern in body → file-hosting-link intake classification

intake_classification.rationale: F3.FL routes intake to file-hosting handler when URL pattern detected at pre-create time.

file_hosting_link_detected.rationale: wetransfer.com URL triggers F2.FH (sibling gate to F3.FL classification).

must_include.rationale: F3.FL classification surfaces link-shape to admin.
